weekly_summary.headline: Dense operational week: cash management page shipped to a design review, a new customer integration kicked off, a bug root-caused and communicated, and a partner pricing decision made.
key_accomplishments: Shipped the cash management page redesign through design review
Led the kickoff call for a new three-way customer integration
Root-caused a duplicate-transaction bug and communicated the fix path to the affected customer
Closed out a partner pricing decision with the leadership team
weekly_summary.inferred_objective: Advance the cash management redesign, unblock the new customer integration, and resolve the standing partner pricing question.
weekly_summary.patterns_and_tensions: Solid week of cross-functional execution. Most of the week's energy went to solution engineering and integration work, with product design threaded through review sessions rather than dedicated discovery time. No interpersonal friction observed; one open watch item on total meeting load.
weekly_summary.behaviour_summary: Collaborative and direct throughout the week. Took ownership of ambiguous problems (the duplicate-transaction bug) without waiting to be asked, and handled a partner pricing negotiation calmly.
customer_calls_this_week: Weekly sync with Acme (Tom Thorn) — cash management feedback
Kickoff call with a new enterprise customer — integration scoping
Partner pricing review — internal, with leadership
weekly_summary.one_next_action: Carve out a dedicated block next week for product discovery work that isn't tied to a specific customer call.
